languages.text: {n}С пистонов на подбородке Эоганна срываются искры, а его батареи издают предупредительный гул. Манипулус завороженно всматривается в механическое чудовище.{/n} "Этот конструкт экстремально опасен, но сколь непостижима его суть! Если вы и впрямь намерены забрать его, Вольный Торговец, я заявляю приоритетное право на постижение".

{n}Sparks crackle from the pistons on Eogunn's chin, as his batteries emit a warning growl. The Manipulus stares in fascination at the mechanical monster.{/n} "This construct is extremely dangerous, yet how unfathomable its nature is! If you truly intend to claim it, Rogue Trader, I assert my priority right to study it."
languages.original_text: {n}С пистонов на подбородке Эоганна срываются искры, а его батареи издают предупредительный гул. Манипулус завороженно всматривается в механическое чудовище.{/n} "Этот конструкт экстремально опасен, но сколь непостижима его суть! Если вы и впрямь намерены забрать его, Вольный Торговец, я заявляю приоритетное право на постижение".

traits.locale_text: {n}Sparks crackle from the ports on Eogunn's chin, as his batteries emit a warning growl. The Manipulus fixes a fascinated glare upon the mechanical monster.{/n} "This construct is extremely dangerous, yet how unfathomable its nature is! If you truly intend to claim it, Rogue Trader, I assert my priority right to study it."

The Manipulus stares in fascination at the mechanical monster.{/n} "This construct is extremely dangerous, yet how unfathomable its nature is! If you truly intend to claim it, Rogue Trader, I assert my priority right to study it."

languages.text: {n}Las chispas restallan en los pistones de la barbilla de Eogunn mientras sus baterías emiten un gruñido de advertencia. El manipulus observa fascinado al monstruo mecánico.{/n} «Este constructo es extremadamente peligroso, pero ¡qué insondable es su naturaleza! Si de verdad pretende hacerse con él, Comerciante, ejerceré mi derecho prioritario a estudiarlo».
languages.original_text: {n}Sparks crackle from the pistons on Eogunn's chin, as his batteries emit a warning growl. The Manipulus stares in fascination at the mechanical monster.{/n} "This construct is extremely dangerous, yet how unfathomable its nature is! If you truly intend to claim it, Rogue Trader, I assert my priority right to study it."

traits.locale_text: {n}Las chispas restallan en los pistones de la barbilla de Eogunn mientras sus baterías emiten un gruñido de advertencia. El manipulus observa fascinado al monstruo mecánico.{/n} «Este constructo es extremadamente peligroso, pero ¡qué insondable es su naturaleza! Si de verdad pretende hacerse con él, Comerciante, ejerceré mi derecho prioritario a estudiarlo».

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡下巴的活塞上溅出火花，体内的电池发出低沉的警告咆哮。操纵者着迷地盯着那个机械怪物。{/n}“这个造物极度危险，然而它的本质又是如此深不可测！如果您当真打算将其据为己有，行商浪人，我主张获得优先研究权。”
languages.original_text: {n}Sparks crackle from the pistons on Eogunn's chin, as his batteries emit a warning growl. The Manipulus stares in fascination at the mechanical monster.{/n} "This construct is extremely dangerous, yet how unfathomable its nature is! If you truly intend to claim it, Rogue Trader, I assert my priority right to study it."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡下巴的活塞上溅出火花，体内的电池发出低沉的警告咆哮。操纵者着迷地盯着那个机械怪物。{/n}“这个造物极度危险，然而它的本质又是如此深不可测！如果您当真打算将其据为己有，行商浪人，我主张获得优先研究权。”

languages.text: {n}Funken stieben aus den Kolben an Eogunns Kinn, als aus seinen Batterien ein warnendes Knurren ertönt. Der Manipulus starrt fasziniert auf das mechanische Monster.{/n} "Dieses Konstrukt ist extrem gefährlich, aber in seiner Natur unergründlich! Solltet Ihr es wirklich für Euch beanspruchen, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}, bitte ich um das Vorrecht, es studieren zu dürfen."
languages.original_text: {n}Sparks crackle from the pistons on Eogunn's chin, as his batteries emit a warning growl. The Manipulus stares in fascination at the mechanical monster.{/n} "This construct is extremely dangerous, yet how unfathomable its nature is! If you truly intend to claim it, Rogue Trader, I assert my priority right to study it."

traits.locale_text: {n}Funken stieben aus den Kolben an Eogunns Kinn, als aus seinen Batterien ein warnendes Knurren ertönt. Der Manipulus starrt fasziniert auf das mechanische Monster.{/n} "Dieses Konstrukt ist extrem gefährlich, aber in seiner Natur unergründlich! Solltet Ihr es wirklich für Euch beanspruchen, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}, bitte ich um das Vorrecht, es studieren zu dürfen."

languages.text: {n}Des étincelles s'échappent des pistons fixés sur le menton d'Eogunn, tandis que ses batteries émettent un grondement dissuasif. Le manipulus observe le monstre mécanique d'un air fasciné.{/n} « Cet engin est extrêmement dangereux, mais sa nature échappe à toute tentative d'identification ! Si vous comptez vraiment le récupérer, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}, je revendique mon droit prioritaire à l'étudier. »
languages.original_text: {n}Sparks crackle from the pistons on Eogunn's chin, as his batteries emit a warning growl. The Manipulus stares in fascination at the mechanical monster.{/n} "This construct is extremely dangerous, yet how unfathomable its nature is! If you truly intend to claim it, Rogue Trader, I assert my priority right to study it."

traits.locale_text: {n}Des étincelles s'échappent des pistons fixés sur le menton d'Eogunn, tandis que ses batteries émettent un grondement dissuasif. Le manipulus observe le monstre mécanique d'un air fasciné.{/n} « Cet engin est extrêmement dangereux, mais sa nature échappe à toute tentative d'identification ! Si vous comptez vraiment le récupérer, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}, je revendique mon droit prioritaire à l'étudier. »

languages.text: {n}Eogunn'un çenesindeki pistonlardan kıvılcımlar çıkıyor, bataryalarından da uyarıcı bir hırıltı yükseliyor. Manipülus, büyülenmiş bir şekilde mekanik canavara bakıyor.{/n} "Bu yapı son derece tehlikeli ancak doğası pek bir akıl almaz! Gerçekten üzerinde hak iddia etmeyi düşünüyorsanız Hür Tacir, onu inceleme konusundaki öncelik talep ediyorum."
languages.original_text: {n}Sparks crackle from the pistons on Eogunn's chin, as his batteries emit a warning growl. The Manipulus stares in fascination at the mechanical monster.{/n} "This construct is extremely dangerous, yet how unfathomable its nature is! If you truly intend to claim it, Rogue Trader, I assert my priority right to study it."

Manipülus, büyülenmiş bir şekilde mekanik canavara bakıyor.{/n} "Bu yapı son derece tehlikeli ancak doğası pek bir akıl almaz! Gerçekten üzerinde hak iddia etmeyi düşünüyorsanız Hür Tacir, onu inceleme konusundaki öncelik talep ediyorum."

languages.text: {n}エオグンの顎のピストンから火花が飛び散り、バッテリーから警告の唸り声が漏れる。マニピュラスは機械的な怪物に魅了され見つめる。{/n}「この構築物は非常に危険だが、その性質は理解しがたい。もし本当にこの構築物を手に入れたいのなら、ローグ・トレーダー、私はその研究優先権を主張する。」
languages.original_text: {n}Sparks crackle from the pistons on Eogunn's chin, as his batteries emit a warning growl. The Manipulus stares in fascination at the mechanical monster.{/n} "This construct is extremely dangerous, yet how unfathomable its nature is! If you truly intend to claim it, Rogue Trader, I assert my priority right to study it."
